default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [21 metadata-optimized articles completed; cannibalization analysis done for use case and resource pages](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [SEO performance shows overall improvement in clicks, impressions, and average position](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [New content cluster focus: incident communications for transportation vertical](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Process adjustment needed for content review and publication workflow](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Optimization

  - [21 metadata-optimized articles completed](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Axel finished articles ahead of schedule; 3 remaining articles to be completed tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Cannibalization analysis conducted for use case and resource pages](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Recommendations provided for page consolidation, content combination, and internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Discussion on deleting/redirecting pages (e.g., "texting vs. email in workplace") with consideration for SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Overall bump in traffic observed](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Slight uptick in new content performance for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Refreshes temporarily down due to no posts last week](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Prateek's analysis of top-performing pages shows stable or growing SEO performance over 16 months](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Discrepancy noted between Locker dashboard (showing keyword ranking drops) and Google Search Console data (showing improvements)](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Google Search Console data:](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Blog position improved from 40 to 24](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Overall website position improved from 38 to 26](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Increases in clicks and impressions over last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content Review and Publication Process

  - [Current timeline: Handover by Wednesday, changes by Friday, review by Monday/Tuesday, publish next week](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Goal to create a buffer of additional content for smoother workflow](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Jessica requests more time for thorough review before staging](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)

### New Content Cluster: Incident Communications

  - [Focus on incident reporting for transportation companies](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Key benefits: instant documentation, company protection, evidence for potential legal issues](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Multiple customers highlighting the importance of this use case](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [To be added alongside ongoing enterprise content and employee texting topics](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to investigate discrepancy between Locker Studio report and Google Search Console data](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Sadira to work on creating a content buffer for smoother review process](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Team to implement new review timeline: Jessica to review by Monday, team to revise by Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Sadira to research and propose keywords for the new incident communications cluster](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
  - [Continue work on enterprise content and employee texting topics](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Implement cannibalization recommendations for resource and use case pages](https://fathom.video/share/cy7g7ME4UAoynjDFfG_r_6WQ3wpp2W_2?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)

action_items.description: Provide list of competitors for share of voice analysis to Sadira
Investigate discrepancy in Looker Studio report vs Google Search Console data for keyword rankings
Write 1-2 paragraphs on incident reporting use case for new content cluster
Research and propose keywords for new incident communications topic cluster
